category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison - China export to Samoa.

title.en: China-to-Samoa EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入萨摩亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入薩摩亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Samoa MCIL, OOTR, and EPC expectations, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector direction, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, Samoa 230/400 V 50 Hz grid conditions, cyclone and salt-mist coastal derating, sea-freight logistics via Apia, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与萨摩亚MCIL、OOTR和EPC预期、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC证据、萨摩亚230/400 V 50 Hz电网条件、气旋和沿海盐雾降额、经阿皮亚海运物流，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與薩摩亞MCIL、OOTR和EPC預期、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、IEC 61000 EMC證據、薩摩亞230/400 V 50 Hz電網條件、氣旋和沿海鹽霧降額、經阿皮亞海運物流，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Samoa, the practical gaps are IEC-aligned product evidence, connector conversion from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC, EPC project-level grid connection acceptance, OOTR electricity-sector oversight, IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence, and environmental derating for coastal salt mist, cyclones, humidity, heat, corrosion, and sea-freight handling via Apia. Samoa uses 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The frequency matches China, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline, so input-voltage range, protection settings, cable ratings, and thermal derating must be documented. Samoa's EV market is essentially non-existent or very early-stage, and a dedicated EVSE national certification rule or strong dedicated standards body could not be confirmed from official public sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify the current MCIL import route, OOTR/EPC connection requirements, HS code, and project specification before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入萨摩亚时，实务差距包括：IEC体系产品证据；接口从GB/T 20234转换为交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；EPC项目级电网接入验收；OOTR电力行业监管；IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量证据；以及针对沿海盐雾、气旋、湿热、腐蚀和经阿皮亚海运装卸的环境降额。萨摩亚采用230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线，因此必须形成输入电压范围、保护设置、电缆额定值和热降额文件。截至2026年6月14日，萨摩亚电动汽车市场基本不存在或仍处于极早期，未能从官方公开来源确认专门适用于EVSE整机的国家认证规则或强力专门标准机构；出口商应在出货前核实当前MCIL进口路径、OOTR/EPC接入要求、HS编码和项目规范。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入薩摩亞時，實務差距包括：IEC體系產品證據；接口從GB/T 20234轉換為交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；EPC項目級電網接入驗收；OOTR電力行業監管；IEC 61000 EMC和電能質量證據；以及針對沿海鹽霧、氣旋、濕熱、腐蝕和經阿皮亞海運裝卸的環境降額。薩摩亞採用230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線，因此必須形成輸入電壓範圍、保護設置、電纜額定值和熱降額文件。截至2026年6月14日，薩摩亞電動汽車市場基本不存在或仍處於極早期，未能從官方公開來源確認專門適用於EVSE整機的國家認證規則或強力專門標準機構；出口商應在出貨前核實當前MCIL進口路徑、OOTR/EPC接入要求、HS編碼和項目規範。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, MCIL scope determination, OOTR decision, EPC connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Samoa import, electricity-sector, EPC project, IEC standard edition, and installation requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、MCIL适用范围裁定、OOTR决定、EPC接入批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行萨摩亚进口、电力行业、EPC项目、IEC标准版本及安装要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、MCIL適用範圍裁定、OOTR決定、EPC接入批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行薩摩亞進口、電力行業、EPC項目、IEC標準版本及安裝要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
